scripts.dev: node scripts/generate-covers.mjs && npm run check && node .vitepress/generate-music.mjs && vitepress dev
scripts.build: node scripts/clean-vitepress-cache.mjs && node scripts/generate-covers.mjs && npm run check && node .vitepress/generate-music.mjs && vitepress build && node .vitepress/generate-rss.mjs && node scripts/check-build.mjs
